Bob asks about defense contractors with reasonable dividend and long-term appeal. I like Lockheed Martin; always confused by Trump's no-buyback/no-dividend threat but still works here.
Best defense stock in group; while Cramer not recommending defense broadly, LMT is preferred choice if exposure desired given scale and sustainable cash generation.
Best-in-group defense contractor if forced to own one; government spending on defense likely to persist despite cycle concerns; prefers LMT over newer/cheaper drone plays.

Defense supplier with strong order backlog; defense department needs weapons; stock winner even at current elevated levels.
